mapper.select: SELECT VOLUN_ACT_NO AS volunActNo, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE AS volunActTitle, TO_CHAR(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, 'YY.MM.DD') AS recruBegin, TO_CHAR(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, 'YY.MM.DD') AS recruEnd, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT AS maxCount FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, T.* FROM ( SELECT A.USER_NO AS userNo, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_ID AS userId, FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, U.USER_BIRTH)/12) AS userAge, TO_CHAR(A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, 'YY.MM.DD') AS volunActApplyDate FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A JOIN TBL_USER U ON A.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo} ORDER BY A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}
